name: claude-tech-squad
description: Complete software delivery squad — 81 specialist agents and 28 skills covering the full pipeline (discovery, implementation, review, security, release). Stack-aware routing for Django, React, Vue, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, Ruby, PHP, .NET, Elixir. Embedded squad-cli orchestrator with preflight, doom-loop detection, checkpoints, cost guardrails, SEP logs (~80% token reduction). Dedicated LLM/AI bench and audit-class skills covering 16 security dimensions (LGPD/GDPR/PCI/SOC2). See README for the full skill catalog.
